name: what-about-you
prompt: Medium shot. Brunette woman inside room CENTER, standing beside couch, asking direct question toward door RIGHT. Dark-haired man visible at door RIGHT edge of frame. Warm amber room visible around her, couch and furniture. Direct expression, already knowing the answer. Warm overhead lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: the-offer
prompt: Close-up. Auburn-haired woman in corridor, eyes moving deliberately to someone specific off-frame LEFT. Hope underneath fear, making an offer. Cool corridor light behind, warm room light on her face. The offer is for him specifically. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Maren
dialogue.text: I'm leaving tonight. Transport at secondary port. Room for more. Both of you, if you want.

name: the-room-shrinks
prompt: Wide shot from room corner. Three figures: dark-haired man (Idris) at door RIGHT side of frame, brunette woman (Sera) standing CENTER by couch, auburn-haired woman (Maren) in corridor visible through doorway LEFT side. Officers quarters around them — books on desk, jacket on chair, couch center. Warm amber lighting that was cozy now feels like exposure. The space between them visible — Idris separated from both women. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: the-hollow-answer
prompt: Close-up, tight framing. Dark-haired man giving hollow answer. Flat expression — he can hear how empty his own words sound. Dark eyes distant. Warm amber light from LEFT. Background: empty negative space, stark and hollow. The words echoing in nothing. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
